scope.question: Battle-test isolated Codex orchestration with a harmless synthetic candidate output.

inputs.summary: Coordinator-specified isolated orchestration smoke job requiring one self-contained candidate_change and final agent_run ledger output.
Repository plan and orchestration smoke battle-test context.
Runbook guidance for candidate-producing agent outputs and promotion boundaries.
Agent-run output contract, write policy, and wrapper-owned check guidance.
Codex worker execution, output, validation, and orchestration smoke instructions.
Structured Codex output schema for the final worker response.
Canonical agent_run schema used by repository validation after wrapper persistence.
Candidate_change schema used for the smoke candidate record.
Smoke fixture defining the expected candidate path, proposed record ledger, and quality gates.

outputs.summary: Created the synthetic smoke candidate only at data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json; no scientific evidence records were created, updated, deleted, or promoted.

proposed_records.rationale: Creates only this synthetic smoke-test candidate so orchestration ledgers can be validated without scientific evidence record changes.
